name: @emin-bit/power-platform-mcp
description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that bridges Claude with the Microsoft Power Platform CLI (pac and pacx) and Dataverse Web API. 112 typed tools covering auth, environments, solutions, canvas apps (incl. local YAML↔JSON pack-sync that fixes pac canvas pack's known PA3013 bug, plus direct Dataverse layer inspect/remove for unblocking solution imports), Power Pages, PCF, plugins, connections, connectors, applications, model builder, telemetry, PACX table/column/workflow operations, a generic passthrough escape hatch, a cross-platform pp_token helper, and pp_self_review for log mining. Hardened solution_import refuses to run against the wrong tenant when expected_environment_url is provided. SERVER_INSTRUCTIONS embeds the full canvas-app deploy recipe, Power Fx syntax cheatsheet, Power Automate flow categories, and tenant-safety golden rules.
author: Emin Mujabašić

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run test
